title: My Requests Navigation

posts.author: curtis.kimball (Curtis K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Basic navigation usability:
When I respond to a ticket, I get left in that page with no way to get back to the list other than the browser back button.
You should make the “my request” page header consistent so that it shows on the request pages
